metaDescription: Professional carpenter ant control in NYC. Protect wood structures. Free inspection. Licensed exterminators. 30-day guarantee. Call now.
h1: Carpenter Ant Control in NYC — Stop the Structural Damage
heroParagraph: Carpenter ants don't eat wood — they excavate it, hollowing out galleries for nesting in moist or damaged structural timber. Left untreated, a mature carpenter ant colony causes damage comparable to termites. They're common in NYC brownstones, wood-frame outer borough homes, and suburban properties with mature landscaping. Professional treatment requires locating and treating the satellite colonies inside the structure, not just the foraging workers you see.
